name: Recursion Pharmaceuticals
confidenceReason: DISQUALIFIED: Pre-revenue, binary-outcome biotech. Pricing relies on venture-style clinical trial probabilities, completely breaking the EPS compounding model.
bullCase: A massive + venture cash infusion provides the runway necessary to execute their ambitious AI-driven drug discovery pipeline. If their Phase 2 clinical trials succeed, they possess the structural monopoly of a foundational AI dataset that traditional pharma companies cannot easily replicate.
bearCase: DISQUALIFIED: Pre-revenue, binary-outcome biotech. Pricing relies on venture-style clinical trial probabilities, completely breaking the EPS compounding model. A capital incinerator. The business model is mathematically unsustainable without continuous dilution ($368.57M in recent filings). If Phase 2 trials fail, intrinsic equity value approaches zero.

cagrModel.note: Pre-profit biotech; PE-based model not applicable
